content.rendered:
Set in Topaz 8

The Topaz 8 face is the iconic Amiga system font. The WB3.1 palette — blue, orange, white, black — is sampled from TAWS. Window chrome is rebuilt in CSS from intuition.library reference.

Emulator

The pulldown screen runs SAE (Scripted Amiga Emulator) booted from an AROS Kickstart and Workbench hardfile.

excerpt.rendered: The tools and fonts behind the site.
